container.paragraph: Build a solver using generated code

div.paragraph: This file should be saved as a CMakeLists.txt file for generation with CMake.
div.literal_block:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
set(INPUT_HELP "Please enter the name of the model file to solve (with extension, .xml, or .cellml) using the syntax -DINPUT_MODEL=your_filename.") set(INPUT_MODEL "$ENV{INPUT_MODEL}" CACHE FILEPATH ${INPUT_HELP})
if("${INPUT_MODEL}" STREQUAL "") message(FATAL_ERROR "${INPUT_HELP}") endif()
get_filename_component(INPUTNAME ${INPUT_MODEL} NAME_WE) get_filename_component(INPUTDIR ${INPUT_MODEL} DIRECTORY)
set(PROJECT_NAME solve_${INPUTNAME})
project(${PROJECT_NAME} VERSION 0.1.0)
execute_process( COMMAND python "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generateModel.py" -m ${INPUT_MODEL} -p C -o ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} OUTPUT_VARIABLE _OUT OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE )
string(REPLACE "Generated file: " "" GENERATED_C_MODEL "${_OUT}") get_filename_component(GENERATED_FILE_NAME "${GENERATED_C_MODEL}" NAME) string(REPLACE ".c" ".h" GENERATED_HEADER "${GENERATED_FILE_NAME}")
configure_file( ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generated_include.h.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated_include.h @ONLY )
set(PROJECT_SRC solveGeneratedModel.cpp ${GENERATED_C_MODEL} )
add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME} ${PROJECT_SRC}) target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}") target_compile_features(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC cxx_std_20)
message("") message("1) First, build the executable") message("2) Then, solve by running: ./${PROJECT_NAME} with the arguments:") message(" -n step_total") message(" -dt step_size") message("")
